llmSegmentedChunks.chunkText: ● Press-on nails: Available ● Gel polish removal: $10 AUD ● Nail repairs (using powder/acrylic mix): Available, though pricing is not always discussed ● Simple nail cleaning (e.g., pedicure without polish): Available, typically $40 AUD ● Haircuts are not offered. Luisa does not offer any beauty services outside of nails and braiding.

Materials and Techniques: ● Luisa does not use polygel. ● She works with shellac, traditional nail polish, and press-on nails. ● Clients are encouraged to send a photo of their desired design and colors in advance, to ensure preparation.

Estimated Time per Appointment: ● Nail services usually take between 30 to 40 minutes, depending on the service. ● For braids, it’s recommended to discuss the desired style and confirm availability—she has done braiding for both adults and children.
Client Profile: ● Luisa serves both women and men. ● Male clients have booked pedicures and braiding. ● She is also able to work with children, as seen in braiding requests for younger clients.
llmSegmentedChunks.categoryName: General Information / Articles: For informative content like blog posts, articles, guides, industry insights, or company news that doesn't fall into other specific business function categories.

llmSegmentedChunks.chunkText: Punctuality and Delays: ● Luisa asks clients to notify her in case of delays or cancellations.
